# johnny4young Homebrew Tap

Homebrew casks and formulae for Johnny Young's projects.

## Install

Add the tap once, then install anything from it:

<!-- BEGIN:install-tap (auto-generated by scripts/sync-readme.py — do not edit) -->
```bash
brew tap johnny4young/tap

# Casks (macOS apps)
brew install --cask gancho
brew install --cask portavoz
brew install --cask vitrine

# Formulae (CLIs, macOS + Linux)
brew install gos
```
<!-- END:install-tap -->

Or install directly, without tapping first:

<!-- BEGIN:install-notap (auto-generated by scripts/sync-readme.py — do not edit) -->
```bash
# Casks (macOS apps)
brew install --cask johnny4young/tap/gancho
brew install --cask johnny4young/tap/portavoz
brew install --cask johnny4young/tap/vitrine

# Formulae (CLIs, macOS + Linux)
brew install johnny4young/tap/gos
```
<!-- END:install-notap -->

The `gancho` cask also puts the bundled `gancho` CLI (and its local MCP server)
on your PATH.

## Available casks

<!-- BEGIN:casks (auto-generated by scripts/sync-readme.py — do not edit) -->
| Cask | Version | Description | Upstream |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `gancho` | `0.6.0` | Privacy-first smart clipboard manager | <https://github.com/johnny4young/gancho> |
| `portavoz` | `0.5.1` | Privacy-first meeting assistant — knows who said what, locally | <https://portavoz.app> |
| `vitrine` | `0.20.0` | Menu-bar app that turns code into beautiful images | <https://vitrineframe.app> |
<!-- END:casks -->

## Available formulae

<!-- BEGIN:formulae (auto-generated by scripts/sync-readme.py — do not edit) -->
| Formula | Version | Description | Upstream |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `gos` | `1.7.0` | Go Switch - install and switch Go versions in seconds | <https://github.com/johnny4young/gos> |
<!-- END:formulae -->

`gos` previously lived in the standalone `johnny4young/gos` tap. That tap is
deprecated and re-points existing users here automatically via its
`tap_migrations.json`, so `brew update` migrates them with no manual re-tap.

## Requirements

- Casks: macOS Sonoma 14 or newer (`vitrine`); macOS Tahoe 26 or newer (`gancho`); Homebrew with Cask support.
- Formulae: `gos` runs on macOS and Linux.

## Updating

```bash
brew update
brew upgrade --cask vitrine
```

Vitrine also includes Sparkle auto-updates for direct-download installs, so the cask is marked `auto_updates true`. Homebrew can still install or upgrade the published DMG explicitly.

## Verifying the published artifact

Each cask points at a signed and notarized GitHub Release DMG, and each formula
at a pinned source tarball. The exact `version` and `sha256` for every artifact
live in its `.rb` file under [`Casks/`](Casks) and [`Formula/`](Formula) — the
same source the version table above is generated from. Homebrew verifies the
recorded checksum before installing.

## Maintainers

Release/bump instructions live in [docs/RELEASING.md](docs/RELEASING.md).
